Name: OrganizationIdType_VS
Title: Organization It Type VS
Description: Id types for organizations involved in DiagnosticReport/Observation

Name: PersonIdType_VS
Title: Person Id Type VS
Description: Id types used to identify persons involved, other than the patient.

Name: PublicIdType_VS
Title: PublicIdType_VS
Description: Id types used to identify patients

Name: SpecimenType_VS
Title: Specimen Type VS
Description: Type og material in specimen.

Name: AllLanguages
Title: All Languages
Description: This value set includes all possible codes from BCP-47 (see http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
Title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
Description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

Name: PracticeSettingCodeValueSet
Title: Practice Setting Code Value Set
Description: This is the code representing the clinical specialty of the clinician or provider who    interacted with, treated, or provided a service to/for the patient. The value set used    for clinical specialty has been limited by HITSP to the value set reproduced from HITSP    C80 Table 2-149 Clinical Specialty Value Set Definition.

Name: FHIRDeviceAvailabilityStatus
Title: FHIR Device Availability Status
Description: The availability status of the device.

Name: FHIRDeviceCategory
Title: FHIR Device Category
Description: The association state of the device.

Name: DeviceNameType
Title: Device Name Type
Description: The type of name the device is referred by.

Name: FHIRDeviceOperationMode
Title: FHIR Device Operation Mode
Description: The operation mode of the device.

Name: DeviceType
Title: Device Property Type
Description: Codes used to identify medical devices. Includes concepts from SNOMED CT (http://www.snomed.org/) where concept is-a 49062001 (Device)  and is provided as a suggestive example.

Name: DeviceSafety
Title: Device Safety
Description: Codes used to identify medical devices safety characteristics. These codes are taken from the [NCI Thesaurus](https://ncit.nci.nih.gov/ncitbrowser/pages/home.jsf) and are provided here as a suggestive example.

Name: DeviceSpecificationCategory
Title: Device Specification Category
Description: The kind of standards used by the device.

Name: DeviceSpecificationType
Title: Device Specification Type
Description: The type or specification of a standard that devices can adhere to

Name: FHIRDeviceStatus
Title: FHIR Device Status
Description: The status of the Device record.

Name: DeviceType
Title: Device Type
Description: Codes used to identify medical devices. Includes concepts from SNOMED CT (http://www.snomed.org/) where concept is-a 49062001 (Device)  and is provided as a suggestive example.

Name: DeviceVersionType
Title: Device Version Type
Description: Describes the type of version

Name: IdentifierTypeCodes
Title: Identifier Type Codes
Description: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

Name: IdentifierUse
Title: IdentifierUse
Description: Identifies the purpose for this identifier, if known .

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (see http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: SNOMEDCTMedicationAsNeededReasonCodes
Title: SNOMED CT Medication As Needed Reason Codes
Description: This value set includes all clinical findings from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar value set.

Name: ParticipantRoles
Title: Participant Roles
Description: Roles of participants that may be included in a care team.  Defined as: Healthcare professional (occupation) or Services (qualifier value).

Name: PractitionerRole
Title: Practitioner Role
Description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the role of a Practitioner.

Name: ProcedureCodesSNOMEDCT
Title: Procedure Codes (SNOMED CT)
Description: Procedure Code: All SNOMED CT procedure codes.

Name: ProcedureReasonCodes
Title: Procedure Reason Codes
Description: This example value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate a reason for a procedure.

Name: RequestIntent
Title: RequestIntent
Description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a request.

Name: RequestPriority
Title: RequestPriority
Description: Identifies the level of importance to be assigned to actioning the request.

Name: RequestStatus
Title: RequestStatus
Description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a request.

Name: ResourceType
Title: Resource Types
Description: Concrete FHIR Resource Types

Name: ServiceMode
Title: Service Mode
Description: An example set of Service Modes that could be applicable to use to characterize HealthcareServices or PractitionerRoles while searching

Name: ServiceRequestCategoryCodes
Title: Service Request Category Codes
Description: An example value set of SNOMED CT concepts that can classify a requested service

Name: ServiceRequestOrderDetailParameterCode
Title: Servicerequest OrderDetail Parameter Code
Description: The order detail parameter codes.

Name: FHIRSpecimenCollectionMethod
Title: FHIR Specimen Collection Method
Description: This example value set defines a set of codes that can be used to indicate the method by which a specimen was collected.

Name: SpecimenCombined
Title: Specimen Combined
Description: Codes providing the combined status of a specimen.

Name: SpecimenProcessingMethod
Title: Specimen Processing Method
Description: The technique that is used to perform the process or preserve the specimen. These are codes from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar value set.

Name: SpecimenRole
Title: Specimen Role
Description: Codes providing the role of a specimen.

Name: SpecimenStatus
Title: Specimen Status
Description: Codes providing the status/availability of a specimen.

Name: UDIEntryType
Title: UDI Entry Type
Description: Codes to identify how UDI data was entered.

Name: Hl7VSSpecimenCondition
Title: hl7VS-specimenCondition
Description: Concepts of modes or states of being that describe the nature of a specimen.  Used in Version 2 messaging in the SPM segment.

Name: Hl7VSRelevantClincialInformation
Title: hl7VS-relevantClincialInformation
Description: Value Set of codes that specify additional clinical information about the patient or specimen to report the supporting and/or suspected diagnosis and clinical findings on requests for interpreted diagnostic studies.

Name: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType
Title: ServiceDeliveryLocationRoleType
Description: A role of a place that further classifies the setting (e.g., accident site, road side, work site, community location) in which services are delivered.
